message:
fix(embeddings): trim whitespace before regex replace in buildQuoteEntries

The find logic used line.trim().startsWith() but the regex replace didn't
trim first, causing ^Takeaway: and ^Tags: patterns to fail on lines with
leading whitespace.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
